name: HMS Pickle (J 293)
events: 29 Dec 1943 HMS H 28 (Lt. J.W. Kelly, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, most likely, with HMS Pickle (Lt.Cdr. F.C.V. Brightman, RN) and HMS Hart (Cdr.(Retd.) M.B. Sherwood, DSO and Bar, RN). (1)
1 Jan 1944 HMS H 28 (Lt. J.W. Kelly, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, most likely, with HMS Pelorus (A/Cdr.(Emgy.) G. Nelson, RN) and HMS Pickle (Lt.Cdr. F.C.V. Brightman, RN). (2)
2 Jan 1944 HMS H 28 (Lt. J.W. Kelly, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, most likely, with HMS Pickle (Lt.Cdr. F.C.V. Brightman, RN). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
